task.objective: Complete database layer abstraction by migrating remaining standalone db files into the modular lib/db/ structure
task.background:
The project has partially abstracted database operations into lib/db/ with modules like: - connection.ts (shared SQL connection via getSql()) - executions.ts, results.ts, metrics.ts, etc. - index.ts (exports all functions with getQueriesForOrg helper)
However, three files remain outside this structure: - lib/db-orgs.ts (266 lines) - Organization CRUD, members, invites - lib/db-wishlist.ts (77 lines) - Wishlist operations - lib/db-users.ts (281 lines) - User management, invites, auth checks
CRITICAL ISSUE: lib/db-users.ts defines its own getSql() using @neondatabase/serverless directly instead of using the shared connection from lib/db/connection.ts.

mandatory_requirements.requirement: All three files must be migrated to lib/db/ as separate modules
All modules must use getSql() from lib/db/connection.ts (fix db-users.ts duplicate)
Update lib/db/index.ts to export all new functions
Update all imports throughout the codebase to use @/lib/db
Delete original files after migration (lib/db-orgs.ts, lib/db-wishlist.ts, lib/db-users.ts)
Consider adding org-bound query variants to getQueriesForOrg() where applicable

constraints.constraint: Keep solution minimal - preserve existing function signatures
Maintain backwards compatibility for all consumers
No functional changes - pure structural refactoring
Follow existing patterns in lib/db/ modules

task.success_criteria: - All three db-*.ts files migrated to lib/db/ - lib/db-users.ts duplicate getSql() removed - lib/db/index.ts exports all functions - All imports updated across codebase - Original files deleted - Build passes without errors

step.name: File Analysis
step.action:
Analyze each file to understand its functions and dependencies:
1. lib/db-orgs.ts: - Uses getSql() from "./db" (correct) - Functions: createOrganization, getOrganizationById, getOrganizationBySlug, updateOrganization, deleteOrganization, getAllOrganizations, getOrganizationMembers, addOrganizationMember, updateMemberRole, removeMember, getUserOrganizations, isUserMemberOfOrg, createOrgInvite, getOrgInvites - Types: Organization, OrganizationMember, OrganizationWithRole
2. lib/db-wishlist.ts: - Uses getSql() from "./db" (correct) - Functions: addToWishlist, isEmailInWishlist, getWishlistEntries, getWishlistCount
3. lib/db-users.ts: - DEFINES OWN getSql() - MUST BE FIXED - Functions: getUserByEmail, getAllUsers, createUser, updateUserRole, deleteUser, getInviteByEmail, getAllInvites, createInvite, markInviteAsUsedById, markInviteAsUsed, deleteInvite, getDefaultOrgId, createUserFromInvite, checkUserAccess, isAdmin - Types: DashboardUser, Invite
step.output: Document in investigation/analysis.md: - Complete function inventory per file - Import dependencies - Types defined - Consumers of each file

step.name: Consumer Analysis
step.action:
Find all files that import from these modules:
Search patterns: - import.*from.*["']@/lib/db-orgs["'] - import.*from.*["']@/lib/db-users["'] - import.*from.*["']@/lib/db-wishlist["'] - import.*from.*["'].*\/lib\/db-orgs["'] - import.*from.*["'].*\/lib\/db-users["'] - import.*from.*["'].*\/lib\/db-wishlist["']
For each consumer: - Document which functions are imported - Note if any restructuring is needed
step.output: Add to investigation/analysis.md: - List of consumer files per module - Import statements to update - Any special considerations

step.name: Target Structure Design
step.action:
Design the new module structure in lib/db/:
New files: - lib/db/orgs.ts - Organization operations - lib/db/wishlist.ts - Wishlist operations - lib/db/users.ts - User and invite operations
Types placement: - Move types to lib/db/types.ts OR keep inline in modules - Follow existing pattern (check current types.ts)
Index.ts updates: - Add exports for all new functions - Consider which functions belong in getQueriesForOrg()
step.output: Add to investigation/analysis.md: - New file structure diagram - Types placement decision - Index.ts modification plan

step.name: Multi-Tenancy Consideration
step.action:
Evaluate if any functions should be org-bound:
- Organization functions: Already operate on specific orgs by ID - User functions: Some are global (by email), some could be org-scoped - Wishlist: Likely global (marketing/waitlist feature)
Decision: Which functions should be added to getQueriesForOrg()? - getOrganizationMembers(orgId) - Already org-specific - getUserOrganizations(userId) - User-specific, not org-specific - isUserMemberOfOrg(userId, orgId) - Could be useful in org context
step.output: Add to investigation/analysis.md: - Functions to add to getQueriesForOrg() - Rationale for each decision

step.name: Create Phase Prompts
step.action:
Break implementation into logical phases:
Phase 1: Migrate lib/db-orgs.ts - Create lib/db/orgs.ts - Update imports (getSql from ./connection) - Export from lib/db/index.ts - Update consumers - Delete original file
Phase 2: Migrate lib/db-wishlist.ts - Create lib/db/wishlist.ts - Update imports - Export from lib/db/index.ts - Update consumers - Delete original file
Phase 3: Migrate lib/db-users.ts - Create lib/db/users.ts - CRITICAL: Remove duplicate getSql(), use ./connection - Export from lib/db/index.ts - Update consumers - Delete original file
Phase 4: Final Cleanup & Verification - Verify all imports work - Run build to check for errors - Update any documentation if needed

output_deliverables.deliverable: investigation/analysis.md - Full analysis with function inventory, consumers, and design decisions
phases/04_cleanup_verification.xml - Final cleanup and verification prompt

mandatory_final_step.description: Update the feature's status.md file with execution results. This step is MANDATORY and must be executed after all other steps.
mandatory_final_step.action:
After completing all investigation steps, UPDATE the file: docs/prompts/remaining-db-refactoring/status.md
with the following information: - Date: Get from system (date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Prompt: investigation/prompt.xml - Phase: Investigation - Status: completed | partial | blocked - Summary of findings - List of deliverables created - Next steps (link to first phase prompt) - Any blockers encountered

rules.rule: ALWAYS update status.md as the LAST action
Be specific about files created and decisions made
Link to phases/01_migrate_orgs.xml as next step

mandatory_commit_step.description: Commit all changes with a structured message identifying feature and phase.
mandatory_commit_step.commit_format:
feat(remaining-db-refactoring): investigation - {description}
Example: feat(remaining-db-refactoring): investigation - Analysis and phase planning complete
